Trigger.name: Gold Tracking - Mystery Gold Pickups
Trigger.script:
local name = matches[2] local name_key = name:lower()
-- Only watch people we are tracking if goldtracking.names[name_key] then -- Increment the unknown counter goldtracking.unknown_ledger[name_key] = (goldtracking.unknown_ledger[name_key] or 0) + 1
-- RED ALERT cecho(string.format("\n<red>[ALERT]: %s picked up a MYSTERY pile of gold! (Auto-loot artifact detected)", name)) cecho("\n<red> Please ask them how much they got and use 'gold plus <amount>'.") end

regexCodeList.string: ^Some gold falls from the corpse and automatically flies into the hands of (\w+)\.
^.*sovereigns spills from the corpse, flying into the hands of.*before they

Trigger.name: Bribes/Giving
Trigger.script: -- Be careful! If you are distributing loot, this counts as an expense trigger! -- We only want to track this if it's NOT a distribution. -- Usually better to leave 'give' manual or strictly for shops.

Trigger.name: Gold Picked Up - Update Totals
Trigger.script: local amount = tonumber(matches[2]) if amount then -- OLD: goldtracking.plus(amount, true) -- NEW: The handler decides if we count it or give it away goldtracking.handle_loot(amount) end

Trigger.name: Gold Dropped - Grab It
Trigger.script: -- This sends the command to pick up gold from the floor if the goldtracking.pickup setting is on. if goldtracking.enabled and goldtracking.pickup then send("queue add eqbal get gold") end

regexCodeList.string: A pile of golden sovereigns twinkles and gleams.
There is.*pile of golden sovereigns here.

Trigger.name: Gold Tracking - Received
Trigger.script:
-- Remove commas from the number string so Lua can do math (e.g., "1,000" -> "1000") local name = matches[2] local amount_string = matches[3]:gsub(",", "") local amount = tonumber(amount_string) local name_key = name:lower()
if goldtracking.names[name_key] then -- 1. Add to the main pot goldtracking.plus(amount)
-- 2. Update the Ledger (reduce their debt) if goldtracking.ledger[name_key] then local old_debt = goldtracking.ledger[name_key] goldtracking.ledger[name_key] = old_debt - amount
cecho(string.format("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: %s paid off %d (Remaining: %d).", name, amount, goldtracking.ledger[name_key]))
-- If they paid it all off (or overpaid), clear the entry if goldtracking.ledger[name_key] <= 0 then goldtracking.ledger[name_key] = nil cecho("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: %s has settled their debt.", name) end else -- They weren't in the ledger, but we tracked the gold anyway cecho(string.format("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: Accepted %d gold from %s (No prior debt).", amount, name)) end else end

Trigger.name: Gold Tracking - Watchdog
Trigger.script:
local name = matches[2] local amount = tonumber(matches[3]) local name_key = name:lower()
-- Only watch people we are tracking if goldtracking.names[name_key] then -- 1. Add to the Ledger goldtracking.ledger[name_key] = (goldtracking.ledger[name_key] or 0) + amount
-- 2. Alert you visually cecho(string.format("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: <orange>ALERT<msSilver>: <msGold>%s<msSilver> picked up <orange>%d<msSilver> gold!", name, amount)) end

Trigger.name: Capture Gold - All Sources
Trigger.script:
if goldtracking.capture_mode then local line = matches[1] local total_hand = 0 local total_bank = 0
-- Loop through the line to find all gold amounts for amount_str, location in string.gmatch(line, "([%d,]+) gold sovereigns? in your (%w+)") do
-- FIX: The extra parentheses around string.gsub discard the second return value local clean_str = (string.gsub(amount_str, ",", "")) local amount = tonumber(clean_str)
-- Sort into piles if location == "inventory" then total_hand = total_hand + amount elseif location == "containers" then total_hand = total_hand + amount elseif location == "bank" then total_bank = total_bank + amount end end
-- Send to processor goldtracking.process_gold_capture(total_hand, total_bank) end

Alias.name: Gold Tracking Controller
Alias.script:
local args_str = matches[2] or "" local args = args_str:split(" ") local cmd = args[1] and args[1]:lower() or ""
-- If no command is typed (just "gold"), show the display if cmd == "" then goldtracking.display()
-- Help menu elseif cmd == "help" then goldtracking.help() cecho(" <msGold>gold container <name> <msSilver>- Set your loot bag.\n") cecho(" <msGold>gold stash <msSilver>- Put all gold in the loot bag.\n")
-- Toggle the tracker entirely elseif cmd == "on" or cmd == "off" then goldtracking.toggle(cmd)
-- Toggle Autoloot specificallly elseif cmd == "autoloot" then goldtracking.togglepickup(args[2] or "")
-- Set the loot container elseif cmd == "container" then if args[2] then goldtracking.setcontainer(args[2]) else cecho("\n<msSilver>Usage: <msGold>gold container <name>") end
-- Stash gold into the container elseif cmd == "stash" then goldtracking.stash()
-- Add a person to the split elseif cmd == "add" then if args[2] then goldtracking.add(args[2]) end
-- Add entire current party elseif cmd == "party" then goldtracking.add_party()
-- Remove a person from the split elseif cmd == "remove" then if args[2] then goldtracking.remove(args[2]) end
-- Manually add gold (e.g. "gold plus 100") elseif cmd == "plus" then local amt = tonumber(args[2]) if amt then goldtracking.plus(amt) end
-- Manually subtract gold elseif cmd == "minus" then local amt = tonumber(args[2]) if amt then goldtracking.minus(amt) end
-- Pause a specific person (keeps them in list but stops tracking) elseif cmd == "pause" then if args[2] then goldtracking.pause(args[2]) end
-- Unpause a person elseif cmd == "unpause" then if args[2] then goldtracking.unpause(args[2]) end
-- Reset everything to 0 elseif cmd == "reset" then goldtracking.reset()
-- Distribute gold from container to group elseif cmd == "distribute" then goldtracking.distribute()
elseif cmd == "snapshot" then goldtracking.start_snapshot()
-- Check for hidden rewards elseif cmd == "check" then goldtracking.check_reward()
-- Announce totals to party elseif cmd == "report" then goldtracking.announce("party")
-- Set the Accountant elseif cmd == "accountant" then if args[2] then goldtracking.set_accountant(args[2]) else cecho("\n<msSilver>Current Accountant: <msGold>" .. goldtracking.accountant) end
-- Simulate a loot drop (Manual Handover/Report) elseif cmd == "loot" then local amt = tonumber(args[2]) if amt then goldtracking.handle_loot(amt) else cecho("\n<msSilver>Usage: <msGold>gold loot <amount>") end
-- Toggle Auto-Handover elseif cmd == "autohandover" then goldtracking.toggle_handover(args[2] or "")
else cecho("\n<msSilver>Unknown command. Try <msGold>gold help<msSilver>.") end

Script.name: goldtracking.settings
Script.script:
goldtracking = goldtracking or {} goldtracking.settings = {}
-- =========================================================== -- -- Gold Tracking Settings -- -- Edit as Needed -- -- =========================================================== --
-- If you use an ingame command separator, add it here so the -- -- system can use it to break up party announcements. -- goldtracking.settings.commandseparator = ";"
-- This setting is used to set an alias to get gold or put -- gold away. If you use nested containers, wish to add emotes -- -- or other scenarios, enter the serverside alias you use here -- -- !!This is currently not used after a rewrite, needs fix!! -- goldtracking.settings.getalias = false
-- Set the container name in which we should put your gold. -- -- Note that it may be desirable *not* to use the container -- -- you keep your personal gold in, so that it's easier to keep -- -- everything separated. If left false, "pack" will be used -- -- instead. This is only used if you leave the getalias -- -- setting set to false. -- goldtracking.settings.container = "box"
-- If you use a custom prompt function, such as with svo, you -- -- can put that here to make commands look more natural. -- goldtracking.settings.promptfunction = false --goldtracking.settings.promptfunction = function () -- cecho ("\n") --end -- Function ends here.
-- This copies any changes you made here into the settings -- -- table in your variables. -- if goldtracking.getsettings then goldtracking.getsettings () end

Script.name: goldtracking
Script.script:
-- =========================================================== -- -- Gold Tracking Functions & Logic -- -- Fragile! Don't Touch! -- -- =========================================================== --
goldtracking = goldtracking or {} goldtracking.settings = goldtracking.settings or {}
-- 1. Initialize Colors color_table.msGold = {255,215,0} color_table.msSilver = {160,160,160}
-- 2. Initialize Defaults if goldtracking.enabled == nil then goldtracking.enabled = true end goldtracking.pickup = goldtracking.pickup or true goldtracking.names = goldtracking.names or {} goldtracking.paused = goldtracking.paused or {} goldtracking.total = goldtracking.total or 0 goldtracking.org = goldtracking.org or {name = false, percent = 0, gold = 0} goldtracking.starttime = goldtracking.starttime or os.time() goldtracking.ledger = goldtracking.ledger or {} goldtracking.unknown_ledger = goldtracking.unknown_ledger or {} goldtracking.snapshot = goldtracking.snapshot or {hand = 0, bank = 0, phase = nil} goldtracking.baseline = goldtracking.baseline or {hand = 0, bank = 0, set = false} goldtracking.expenses = goldtracking.expenses or 0 local my_name = (gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Name and gmcp.Char.Name.name) or "Unknown" goldtracking.accountant = goldtracking.accountant or my_name goldtracking.autohandover = goldtracking.autohandover or false
-- =========================================================== -- -- HELPER FUNCTIONS -- -- =========================================================== --
-- Helper function to count table size function goldtracking.count(t) local count = 0 for _ in pairs(t) do count = count + 1 end return count end
-- Helper for echo formatting goldtracking.echo = function (x) cecho ("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: " .. x .. "<reset>") end
-- Load settings goldtracking.getsettings = function () if goldtracking.settings then goldtracking.cs = goldtracking.settings.commandseparator or ";" goldtracking.getalias = goldtracking.settings.getalias goldtracking.container = goldtracking.settings.container or "pack" goldtracking.showprompt = goldtracking.settings.promptfunction or function() end end end goldtracking.getsettings()
-- =========================================================== -- -- CORE FUNCTIONS -- -- =========================================================== --
-- Display Function (The Accountant Report) goldtracking.display = function () local status = goldtracking.enabled and "<msGold>enabled" or "<msSilver>disabled" local my_name = (gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Name and gmcp.Char.Name.name) or "Unknown" local accountant = goldtracking.accountant or my_name local role = (accountant:lower() == my_name:lower()) and "<green>(Me)" or "<yellow>(" .. accountant .. ")"
-- 1. Calculate Time and GPH local elapsed = os.time() - goldtracking.starttime if elapsed < 1 then elapsed = 1 end local gph = math.floor((goldtracking.total / elapsed) * 3600)
cecho ("\n") cecho (" <msGold>Gold Tracking " .. status .. " <msSilver>Accountant: " .. role .. "\n") cecho ("\n")
-- 2. Show Total and GPH cecho (" <msSilver>Total Pot: <msGold>" .. goldtracking.total .. "\n") cecho (" <msSilver>Gold/Hour: <msGold>" .. gph .. "\n")
-- 3. Org Split Code if goldtracking.org.name then local name = goldtracking.org.name local gold = math.floor (goldtracking.org.gold) cecho ("\n") local percent = goldtracking.org.percent cecho (" <msSilver>" .. string.format ("%14s", name:title ()) .. ": <msGold>" .. string.format ("%-8s", gold) .. " <msSilver>(" .. percent .. "%)\n") end
-- 4. Individual Split Code if goldtracking.count(goldtracking.names) > 0 then cecho ("\n") end for k, v in pairs (goldtracking.names) do local v = math.floor (v) cecho (" <msSilver>" .. string.format ("%14s", k:title ()) .. ": <msGold>" .. v .. "\n") end
-- 5. Watchdog Ledger (Known Debt + Unknown Piles) local ledger_count = goldtracking.count(goldtracking.ledger) local unknown_count = goldtracking.count(goldtracking.unknown_ledger)
if ledger_count > 0 or unknown_count > 0 then cecho ("\n<orange> -- Gold Held by Others --\n")
-- Combine the list of names from both ledgers local all_holders = {} for k,v in pairs(goldtracking.ledger) do all_holders[k] = true end for k,v in pairs(goldtracking.unknown_ledger) do all_holders[k] = true end
for k, _ in pairs(all_holders) do local debt = goldtracking.ledger[k] or 0 local unknown = goldtracking.unknown_ledger[k] or 0
local str = string.format(" <msSilver>%14s: ", k:title())
if debt > 0 then str = str .. "<orange>" .. math.floor(debt) .. " gold " end
if unknown > 0 then str = str .. "<red>(+" .. unknown .. " unknown piles!)" end
cecho(str .. "\n") end end
cecho ("<reset>\n") goldtracking.showprompt () end
-- Set Accountant goldtracking.set_accountant = function(name) goldtracking.accountant = name:title() goldtracking.echo("Accountant set to <msGold>" .. name) goldtracking.showprompt() end
-- Toggle Auto Handover goldtracking.toggle_handover = function(val) if val == "on" then goldtracking.autohandover = true goldtracking.echo("Auto-Handover <green>ENABLED<msSilver>. I will give gold to " .. goldtracking.accountant) else goldtracking.autohandover = false goldtracking.echo("Auto-Handover <red>DISABLED<msSilver>.") end end
-- Toggle Entire System goldtracking.toggle = function (enabled) local x = goldtracking local state = enabled:lower() == "on" x.enabled = state
-- If enabling and empty, add self to tracking list. if state and x.count(x.names) == 0 and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Name then x.add (gmcp.Char.Name.name:lower ()) end
local msg = state and "<msGold>enabled" or "<msSilver>disabled" x.echo ("tracking " .. msg) x.showprompt () end
-- Math Logic (Add to Totals) goldtracking.plus = function (amt, noecho) local x = goldtracking local original_amt = amt -- Store the gross amount before taxes!
-- 1. Org Split if x.org.name then x.org.gold = x.org.gold + original_amt * (x.org.percent/100) amt = original_amt * ( 1 - x.org.percent/100) -- Shrink the pool for the party end
-- 2. Party Split local num = goldtracking.count(x.names) if num > 0 then local split_share = amt / num for k, v in pairs (x.names) do x.names[k] = v + split_share end end
-- 3. Total x.total = x.total + original_amt -- Use the gross amount here
if not noecho then x.echo ("" .. original_amt .. " gold added") end x.showprompt () end
-- Math Logic (Subtract from Totals) goldtracking.minus = function (amt) local x = goldtracking local i = amt if x.org.name then x.org.gold = x.org.gold - i * (x.org.percent/100) i = i * ( 1 - x.org.percent/100) end
local num = x.count(x.names) if num > 0 then local split_share = i / num for k, v in pairs (x.names) do x.names[k] = v - split_share end end
x.total = x.total - amt x.echo ("<msGold>" .. amt .. " <msSilver>gold removed.") x.showprompt () end
-- Decision Maker (Loot Handler) goldtracking.handle_loot = function (amt) -- SAFETY: If the tracker is disabled, do absolutely nothing. if not goldtracking.enabled then return end
local my_name = (gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Name and gmcp.Char.Name.name) or "Unknown" local acc = goldtracking.accountant or my_name
-- Scenario A: I AM the Accountant (or no accountant set) if acc == my_name then goldtracking.plus(amt, true)
-- Scenario B: I am NOT the Accountant (Worker Mode) else if goldtracking.autohandover then send("give " .. amt .. " gold to " .. acc) goldtracking.echo("Looted <msGold>"..amt.."<msSilver>. Handing over to <msGold>"..acc) else send("pt I picked up " .. amt .. " gold.") goldtracking.echo("Looted <msGold>"..amt.."<msSilver>. Reported to party.") end end end
-- Add Person goldtracking.add = function (name) local name = name:lower() local x = goldtracking if x.names[name] == nil then x.echo ("Added <msGold>" .. name:title () .. " <msSilver>to tracking.") x.names[name] = 0 else x.echo ("<msGold>" .. name:title () .. " <msSilver>is already being tracked.") end x.showprompt () end
-- Remove Person goldtracking.remove = function (name) local name = name:lower() local x = goldtracking if x.names[name] ~= nil then x.echo ("removed <msGold>" .. name:title () .. " <msSilver>from tracking") x.echo ("<msGold>" .. name:title () .. " <msSilver>was at <msGold>" .. math.floor (x.names[name]) .. " <msSilver>gold.") x.names[name] = nil else x.echo ("<msGold>" .. name .. " <msSilver>is not currently being tracked.") end x.showprompt () end
-- Auto-Add Party Members goldtracking.add_party = function() goldtracking.echo("Scanning party members...") send("party", false)
-- Kill any existing temp trigger to avoid duplicates if goldtracking.party_trigger then killTrigger(goldtracking.party_trigger) end
-- Temporary regex to catch standard Achaea party list names -- Matches lines starting with 1+ spaces, a capitalized name, and ignores the rest goldtracking.party_trigger = tempRegexTrigger("^\\s+([A-Z][a-z]+)", function() local name = matches[2] -- Filter out common false positives just in case if name ~= "Party" and name ~= "The" then goldtracking.add(name) end end)
-- Clean up the trigger after 1.5 seconds tempTimer(1.5, function() if goldtracking.party_trigger then killTrigger(goldtracking.party_trigger) goldtracking.party_trigger = nil goldtracking.echo("Party scan complete.") goldtracking.showprompt() end end) end
-- Org Settings goldtracking.setorg = function (name, percent) name = name:lower () local x = goldtracking if percent > 100 then x.echo ("org percent should be between 0 and 100.") else x.echo ("org set to <msGold>" .. name .. " <msSilver>at <msGold>"..percent.."%") x.org.name = name x.org.percent = percent end x.showprompt () end
goldtracking.unsetorg = function () local x = goldtracking if x.org.name == false then x.echo ("no org currently set") else x.echo ("org unset. <msGold>" .. x.org.name:title () .. " <msSilver>had <msGold>" .. math.floor(x.org.gold)) end x.org = {name = false, percent = 0, gold = 0} x.showprompt () end
-- Pausing goldtracking.pause = function (name) local name = name:lower() local x = goldtracking if x.names[name] ~= nil then x.echo ("Gold tracking for <msGold>" .. name:title () .. " <msSilver>paused.") x.paused[name] = x.names[name] x.names[name] = nil else x.echo ("<msGold>" .. name:title () .. " <msSilver>is not currently being tracked.") end x.showprompt () end
goldtracking.unpause = function (name) local name = name:lower() local x = goldtracking if x.paused[name] then x.echo ("Gold tracking for <msGold>" .. name:title () .. " <msSilver>unpaused.") x.names[name] = x.paused[name] x.paused[name] = nil else x.echo ("<msGold>" .. name:title () .. " <msSilver>is not currently paused.") end x.showprompt () end
-- Reset All (Double-Tap to Confirm) goldtracking.reset = function () -- If the flag is true, this is the second tap! Execute the reset. if goldtracking.reset_pending then goldtracking.confirm_reset()
-- Clean up the timer and flag if goldtracking.reset_timer then killTimer(goldtracking.reset_timer) end goldtracking.reset_pending = false
-- If the flag is nil or false, this is the first tap. else goldtracking.reset_pending = true
cecho("\n[GoldTracking]: WARNING! This will wipe ALL data (Total: " .. goldtracking.total .. ").\n") cecho("Type gold reset again within 6 seconds to confirm.\n")
-- Start a 6-second countdown to cancel the pending reset goldtracking.reset_timer = tempTimer(6, function() goldtracking.reset_pending = false cecho("\n[GoldTracking]: Reset cancelled.\n") end) end end
-- Function 2: The Execution (Run when you click the link) goldtracking.confirm_reset = function() local x = goldtracking
-- Clear Data x.names = {} x.paused = {} x.ledger = {} x.unknown_ledger = {} x.org = {name = false, percent = 0, gold = 0} x.total = 0 x.expenses = 0 x.starttime = os.time()
-- Re-add self if gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Name then x.add(gmcp.Char.Name.name) end
-- Re-establish baseline goldtracking.set_baseline()
x.echo ("<red>Tracker has been reset.<reset>") x.showprompt () end
-- Announce / Report goldtracking.announce = function (tar, origin) if goldtracking.enabled then tar = tar:lower () local x = ""
if tar == "party" then x = "pt We've collected " .. goldtracking.total .. " gold this trip." if goldtracking.org.name then local o = goldtracking.org x = x .. goldtracking.cs .. "pt We've collected " .. math.floor(o.gold) .. " gold for " .. o.name:title () end for k, v in pairs (goldtracking.names) do x = x .. goldtracking.cs .. "pt " .. k:title() .. " has " .. math.floor(v) .. " gold." end expandAlias (x) else local amt = 0 if goldtracking.names[tar] then amt = goldtracking.names[tar] elseif goldtracking.paused[tar] then amt = goldtracking.paused[tar] end send ("tell " .. tar .. " You currently have " .. math.floor(amt) .. " gold tracked.") end end end
-- Distribute goldtracking.distribute = function () local cont = goldtracking.container or "pack"
-- 1. Retrieve the loot from the stash send ("get gold from " .. cont)
-- 2. Distribute it for k, v in pairs (goldtracking.names) do if k ~= gmcp.Char.Name.name:lower () then v = math.floor (v) if v > 0 then send ("give " .. v .. " gold to " .. k) end end end
goldtracking.echo("Distributed gold from <msGold>" .. cont)
-- 3. The Safety Prompt cecho("\n\n<msSilver>Distribution complete. Verify everyone received their share.\n") cecho("<msSilver>When you are sure, ") cechoLink("<red>[CLICK HERE TO RESET]", "gold reset", "Click to wipe the tracker data", true) cecho("<msSilver> tracking or type <msGold>gold reset<msSilver>.\n") end
-- Toggle Pickup goldtracking.togglepickup = function (enabled) local x = goldtracking local state = enabled:lower()
if state == "on" then x.pickup = true x.echo("auto-pickup <msGold>enabled") elseif state == "off" then x.pickup = false x.echo("auto-pickup <msSilver>disabled") else x.echo("Usage: goldtracking autoloot <on|off>") end end
-- Help goldtracking.help = function () cecho ("\n") cecho ("<msGold>GOLD TRACKING HELP <msSilver>(Commands start with <msGold>gold<msSilver> or <msGold>goldtracking<msSilver>)\n") cecho ("<msSilver>----------------------------------------------------------------------\n") cecho ("<msGold> BASIC CONTROLS\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold <on|off> <msSilver>- Turn the entire tracker on or off.\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold reset <msSilver>- Reset all totals to 0.\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold report <msSilver>- Announce current totals to Party.\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold party <msSilver>- Add all current party members to the split list.\n")
cecho ("\n<msGold> LOOT & AUTOMATION\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold autoloot <on|off> <msSilver>- Toggle auto-looting from the ground.\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold container <name> <msSilver>- Set your loot bag (e.g., 'pack').\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold stash <msSilver>- Move all carried gold to your container.\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold distribute <msSilver>- Empty container and share gold with group.\n")
cecho ("\n<msGold> GROUP & ACCOUNTING\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold accountant <name> <msSilver>- Designate the banker (Default: You).\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold autohandover <on|off> <msSilver>- Automatically give loot to Accountant.\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold add <name> <msSilver>- Add a person to the split list.\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold remove <name> <msSilver>- Remove a person from the list.\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold pause <name> <msSilver>- Pause a person (keep in list, stop tracking).\n")
cecho ("\n<msGold> ADVANCED & MANUAL\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold snapshot / check <msSilver>- Capture 'Show Gold' to find hidden rewards.\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold loot <amount> <msSilver>- Manually simulate picking up loot.\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold plus <amount> <msSilver>- Manually add to Total (Math only).\n") cecho (" <msGold>gold minus <amount> <msSilver>- Manually subtract from Total.\n") cecho ("\n") goldtracking.showprompt () end
-- Container and Expenses goldtracking.setcontainer = function(name) goldtracking.container = name goldtracking.echo("Container set to <msGold>" .. name) goldtracking.showprompt() end
goldtracking.stash = function() local cont = goldtracking.container or "pack" send("put gold in " .. cont) goldtracking.echo("Stashed all gold into <msGold>" .. cont) end
goldtracking.add_expense = function(amount) goldtracking.expenses = goldtracking.expenses + amount cecho(string.format("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: Recorded expense of <msGold>%d<msSilver> gold.", amount)) end
-- Reward / Snapshot Functions goldtracking.set_baseline = function() goldtracking.baseline.set = false goldtracking.capture_mode = "baseline" send("show gold") end
goldtracking.check_reward = function() -- If we don't have a baseline yet, we can't calculate a reward. if not goldtracking.baseline.set then cecho("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: <yellow>Warning:<msSilver> No baseline established yet (or trigger missed).") cecho("\n<msSilver>Attempting to establish baseline now. Please type <msGold>gold check<msSilver> again after your <msGold>NEXT<msSilver> reward.")
-- Try to set the baseline now, but DO NOT reset the existing tracker totals goldtracking.set_baseline() return end
goldtracking.capture_mode = "check" send("show gold") end
goldtracking.process_gold_capture = function(hand, bank) -- SAFETY: Check types before removing commas. -- If the trigger did the math, these are already numbers. if type(hand) == "string" then hand = tonumber(string.gsub(hand, ",", "")) end if type(bank) == "string" then bank = tonumber(string.gsub(bank, ",", "")) end
-- Ensure we have valid numbers (fallback to 0) hand = hand or 0 bank = bank or 0
if goldtracking.capture_mode == "baseline" then goldtracking.baseline.hand = hand goldtracking.baseline.bank = bank goldtracking.baseline.set = true cecho("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: Baseline set. Hand: " .. hand .. ", Bank: " .. bank)
elseif goldtracking.capture_mode == "check" then -- Calculate current Total Wealth local current_total = hand + bank local start_total = goldtracking.baseline.hand + goldtracking.baseline.bank
-- The Core Formula local wealth_change = current_total - start_total local hidden_profit = wealth_change + goldtracking.expenses - goldtracking.total
if hidden_profit > 0 then cecho(string.format("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: <orange>Hidden Reward Detected!<msSilver> You gained <msGold>%d<msSilver> gold.", hidden_profit)) goldtracking.plus(hidden_profit) elseif hidden_profit < 0 then cecho(string.format("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: Math check negative (%d). Did you spend gold we missed?", hidden_profit)) else cecho("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: No hidden rewards found (Math is balanced).") end
-- Update the baseline goldtracking.baseline.hand = hand goldtracking.baseline.bank = bank goldtracking.expenses = 0 end
goldtracking.capture_mode = nil end
goldtracking.start_snapshot = function() goldtracking.snapshot_mode = true goldtracking.snapshot.phase = "start" send("show gold") end
goldtracking.end_snapshot = function() goldtracking.snapshot_mode = true goldtracking.snapshot.phase = "end" send("show gold") end
goldtracking.check_snapshot_complete = function() if goldtracking.snapshot.hand and goldtracking.snapshot.bank then if goldtracking.snapshot.phase == "start" then goldtracking.snapshot.start_hand = goldtracking.snapshot.hand goldtracking.snapshot.start_bank = goldtracking.snapshot.bank cecho("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: Snapshot taken. Turn in your quest, then type <msGold>gold check<msSilver>.")
elseif goldtracking.snapshot.phase == "end" then local gain_hand = goldtracking.snapshot.hand - goldtracking.snapshot.start_hand local gain_bank = goldtracking.snapshot.bank - goldtracking.snapshot.start_bank local total_gain = gain_hand + gain_bank
if total_gain > 0 then cecho("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: Hidden reward found! You gained <msGold>" .. total_gain .. "<msSilver> gold.") goldtracking.plus(total_gain) else cecho("\n<msSilver>[<msGold>GoldTracking<msSilver>]: No gold gain detected.") end end
goldtracking.snapshot.hand = nil goldtracking.snapshot.bank = nil goldtracking.snapshot_mode = false end end
-- =========================================================== -- -- EVENT HANDLERS -- -- =========================================================== --
-- Login Check function goldtracking_login_check() -- Safety check: ensure GMCP data is actually present if not gmcp or not gmcp.Char or not gmcp.Char.Name then return end
local my_name = gmcp.Char.Name.name:title()
-- Auto-add self to empty tracker if goldtracking.enabled and goldtracking.count(goldtracking.names) == 0 then goldtracking.add(my_name) end
-- Dynamically assign the accountant if it's defaulting to "Unknown" or the old hardcode if goldtracking.accountant == "Unknown" or goldtracking.accountant == "Solina" then goldtracking.accountant = my_name end
if goldtracking.pickup then cecho("\n[GoldTracking]: Auto-pickup is ENABLED.") end end
if registerAnonymousEventHandler then registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Name", "goldtracking_login_check") end
-- Add print on load so you know it worked cecho("\n<green>Gold Tracking Script Loaded Successfully!<reset>")
